(e.g., v1.1.0)

**Model:**

(Please remove sensitive data before pasting)

**Failure description:**
(What went wrong?)

**Expected behavior:**
(What should the prompt have done instead?)

**Evidence:**
(Provide logs, screenshots, or specific quotes from the output)

**Reproduction result:**
(Does it happen consistently when retrying?)
